headline: A Look At Charles Schwab’s (SCHW) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: What Charles Schwab’s Recent Performance Tells Investors Charles Schwab (SCHW) has drawn fresh investor attention after a mixed run in its stock performance, with short term returns under pressure while longer term holders have seen gains. Over the past day and past week, the stock has slipped 0.29% and 1.81% respectively, while it is up slightly over the past month and down 5.45% over the past 3 months.
